content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{
  "change_summary": "Implemented both pending PR-watch remediations in `src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_watch.rs`. The latest-head push watermark now computes the maximum timestamp across GraphQL commit `pushedDate` and matching issue timeline head-update/force-push events, preventing stale bot approvals from being accepted after a newer PR branch update. CI status parsing now centralizes terminal conclusion classification and treats `STARTUP_FAILURE` and `STALE` as failed checks instead of pending. Added regression coverage for a newer timeline event winning over GraphQL `pushedDate`, and for `STARTUP_FAILURE`/`STALE` returning `BlockedByCi`-style failed check entries.",
  "outstanding_risks": [
    "The working tree still contains `.ralph-burning/projects/itn1-1/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/itn1-1/run.json` orchestration-state modifications outside the requested source-review scope."
  ],
